selected_important_turn.text: Me too. I am not good at hunting or fishing. So I generally try to take extra food
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn shifts the interaction from cooperative information-sharing into a self-focused claim. The opponent had just revealed willingness to trade (prosocial), and this reply asserts a personal claim to extra food — a turning point that can close off integrative possibilities.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: As phrased it reads as a grab rather than a bargaining cue; it reduces the shared problem-solving frame and makes future offers more zero-sum. There was room to keep collaboration while stating need (e.g., linking the need to a possible trade), so the move is suboptimal for joint outcomes and relationship.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the cooperative frame while disclosing the constraint: acknowledge the opponent's willingness to trade, state your need briefly, and immediately propose or invite specific trade terms (e.g., "I do need extra food — would trading 1 food for 1 water work for you?"). That preserves integrative options and guides the next step.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (more integrative trades likely if framed cooperatively)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (explicit trade terms reduce one-sided claims)

value2reason.Low: Fire is important but not as important as the other two.
value2reason.Medium: Food is fuel and energy and keeps you going.
value2reason.High: Water is keeps you hydrated and increases your chance of survival.

value2reason.Low: I would need firewood to stay warm, although it is not a neccessity.
value2reason.Medium: I need water to drink. If there isn't any rivers or lakes nearby, water is really important.
value2reason.High: I would need food in order to eat and survive. And I am not good at hunting or fishing.

dialogue.text: Hey there! I'm assuming you enjoy going camping?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes I do, I am going this weekend. Are you going camping too?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Same! I try to go every other weekend.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Oh cool. What supplies do you prefer to take the most of?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I do a lot of hiking mostly, love to take scenic photos. I usually carry food and water supplies?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Me too. I am not good at hunting or fishing. So I generally try to take extra food
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value water the most for survival, so I'd like to secure at least 2 water packages. If you're okay with 1 water, I can offer 2 food in exchange. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I do need extra food — would trading 1 food for 1 water work for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to trade 1 food for 1 water, but I need to be sure I get at least 2 water packages. If you take 1 water, I can give you 2 food in return. Let’s finalize this deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
